# Email Workflow Skill

Email Workflow Skill is a skill package for workflow maps, lifecycle routing, and agent-readable email operations.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add emailworkflowskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://emailworkflowskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://emailworkflowskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://emailworkflowskill.com/skills/emailworkflowskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://emailworkflowskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Email Workflow Strategy: https://emailworkflowskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Email Workflow Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://emailworkflowskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Email Workflow Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://emailworkflowskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
